---
title: "About"
image: assets/IMG_3790 2.HEIC
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: "https://github.com/alexbenanti"
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:alexander.benanti@stonybrook.edu"
---

## About me

I am **Alex Benanti**, an Applied Mathematics PhD researcher at Stony Brook University interested in scientific machine learning, numerical analysis, and computation for partial differential equations.

This blog is intended to be a collection of explanations of traditional methods and ML methods for scientific computing that I have come across in my studies. 

## What you will find here

- derivations connecting modern learning methods to classical applied mathematics;
- fun experiments with numerical linear algebra and PDEs;
- careful readings and replications of scientific machine-learning papers.

## A note on corrections

Technical writing improves through scrutiny. Please open an issue in the site repository when you find an error or an unclear argument.
